name: mern-thinkboard
description: ThinkBoard is a MERN-style notes application with an Express/MongoDB backend and a React/Vite frontend. The backend exposes REST APIs for notes, connects to MongoDB with Mongoose, and uses Upstash Redis for rate limiting. The frontend uses React Router, Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI, Axios, toast notifications, and Lucide icons.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
